questions.question_text_full: What is the ratio of the total number of students who scored 140 marks and above to the total number of students who scored marks between 60 to 120?

questions.question_text_full: The ratio of the monthly incomes of A and B is 11 : 13 and the ratio of their expenditures is 9 : 11. If both of them manage to save Rs. 4,000 per month, then find the difference in their incomes (in Rs.)
